series_metadata.series_description: Provides information about micro bacterium test results such as tuberculosis, bovic and other related organisms collected onto cultures and other clinical materials from clinics, physicians, hospitals, and other medical providers. Also provides informait

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for six month then transfer to the State Records Center. Maintain at the State Records Center for 1.5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
